name: eter
description: Operational memory, expert editing, and creator toolkit for the Eter commerce ecosystem, Feter Stock, Supabase, catalog workflows, mobile app, content production, skills, and plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Eter operating memory, editing, and creator toolkit
interface.longDescription: A repo-local plugin that captures Eter brand rules, Feter Stock Android workflows, Supabase schema and RPC conventions, catalog behavior, content/video pipelines, troubleshooting playbooks, expert editing flow, and skill/plugin creation standards so future work can start from the ecosystem's real operating context.
defaultPrompt: Use @eter to fix the Feter Stock app with the correct Supabase connection.
Use @eter to update the Eter catalog without breaking sections or reseller links.
Use @eter to create a branded Eter video or marketing asset.
Use @eter to debug a known build, Supabase, Android, or catalog issue.
Use @eter to edit the repo professionally when I say Eter without naming files.
Use @eter to create or repair Eter skills and plugins.
